AirportDelayAlert.description:
AirportDelayAlert represents a flight delay advisory at an airport.
 Sourced from FAA and Eurocontrol.

city.description: City where the airport is located.

delayType.description: FlightDelayType represents the type of flight delay.

region.description: AirportRegion represents the geographic region of an airport.

severity.description:
FlightDelaySeverity represents the severity of flight delays at an airport.
 Maps to TS union: 'normal' | 'minor' | 'moderate' | 'major' | 'severe'.

source.description: FlightDelaySource represents the source of delay data.

updatedAt.description: Last data update time, as Unix epoch milliseconds.. Warning: Values > 2^53 may lose precision in JavaScript

AirportOpsSummary.description: AirportOpsSummary contains operational health metrics for a single airport.

avgDelayMinutes.description: Average delay in minutes across delayed flights.

closureStatus.description: Whether the airport is currently closed.

items.description: Active NOTAM summary flags (e.g., "RWY 06/24 CLSD", "LOW VIS OPS").

severity.description:
FlightDelaySeverity represents the severity of flight delays at an airport.
 Maps to TS union: 'normal' | 'minor' | 'moderate' | 'major' | 'severe'.

totalFlights.description: Total flights in the observation window.

updatedAt.description: Last update time as Unix epoch milliseconds.. Warning: Values > 2^53 may lose precision in JavaScript

AirportRef.description: AirportRef is a lightweight reference to an airport.

AviationNewsItem.description: AviationNewsItem represents a single aviation news article or press release.

items.description: Entities matched from the query (airport codes, airline names).

publishedAt.description: Publication time as Unix epoch milliseconds.. Warning: Values > 2^53 may lose precision in JavaScript

Carrier.description: Carrier represents an airline or aircraft operator.

CarrierOpsSummary.description: CarrierOpsSummary contains delay and cancellation metrics for a carrier at an airport.

airport.description: Airport IATA code this summary applies to.

avgDelayMinutes.description: Average delay in minutes across delayed flights.

updatedAt.description: Last update time as Unix epoch milliseconds.. Warning: Values > 2^53 may lose precision in JavaScript

Error.description: Error is returned when a handler encounters an error. It contains a simple error message that the developer can customize.

message.description: Error message (e.g., 'user not found', 'database connection failed')

FieldViolation.description: FieldViolation describes a single validation error for a specific field.

description.description: Human-readable description of the validation violation (e.g., 'must be a valid email address', 'required field missing')

field.description: The field path that failed validation (e.g., 'user.email' for nested fields). For header validation, this will be the header name (e.g., 'X-API-Key')

FlightInstance.description: FlightInstance represents a specific occurrence of a flight on a given date.

actualArrival.description: Actual arrival time as Unix epoch milliseconds (UTC).. Warning: Values > 2^53 may lose precision in JavaScript

actualDeparture.description: Actual departure time as Unix epoch milliseconds (UTC).. Warning: Values > 2^53 may lose precision in JavaScript

aircraftIcao24.description: ICAO 24-bit transponder address of the aircraft (hex, e.g., "4b1805").

items.description: Codeshare flight numbers marketed under this operating flight.

delayMinutes.description: Delay in minutes (0 if on time, negative if early).

diverted.description: Whether the flight has been diverted.

estimatedArrival.description: Estimated arrival time as Unix epoch milliseconds (UTC).. Warning: Values > 2^53 may lose precision in JavaScript

estimatedDeparture.description: Estimated departure time as Unix epoch milliseconds (UTC).. Warning: Values > 2^53 may lose precision in JavaScript

scheduledArrival.description: Scheduled arrival time as Unix epoch milliseconds (UTC).. Warning: Values > 2^53 may lose precision in JavaScript

scheduledDeparture.description: Scheduled departure time as Unix epoch milliseconds (UTC).. Warning: Values > 2^53 may lose precision in JavaScript

status.description: FlightInstanceStatus represents the operational status of a flight occurrence.

updatedAt.description: Last update time as Unix epoch milliseconds.. Warning: Values > 2^53 may lose precision in JavaScript

GeoCoordinates.description: GeoCoordinates represents a geographic location using WGS84 coordinates.

GetAirportOpsSummaryRequest.description: GetAirportOpsSummaryRequest specifies which airports to summarize.

GetAirportOpsSummaryResponse.description: GetAirportOpsSummaryResponse contains operational summaries for requested airports.

cacheHit.description: Whether the response was served from cache.

GetCarrierOpsRequest.description: GetCarrierOpsRequest specifies parameters for carrier operations metrics.

items.description: IATA airport codes to aggregate carrier metrics from.

minFlights.description: Minimum number of flights required to include a carrier (default: 1).

updatedAt.description: Last update time as Unix epoch milliseconds.. Warning: Values > 2^53 may lose precision in JavaScript

GetFlightStatusRequest.description: GetFlightStatusRequest specifies a flight to look up.

origin.description: Optional origin airport IATA code to disambiguate.

cacheHit.description: Whether the response was served from cache.

ListAirportDelaysRequest.description: ListAirportDelaysRequest specifies filters for retrieving airport delay alerts.

minSeverity.description:
FlightDelaySeverity represents the severity of flight delays at an airport.
 Maps to TS union: 'normal' | 'minor' | 'moderate' | 'major' | 'severe'.

region.description: AirportRegion represents the geographic region of an airport.

ListAirportDelaysResponse.description: ListAirportDelaysResponse contains airport delay alerts matching the request.

ListAirportFlightsRequest.description: ListAirportFlightsRequest specifies parameters for retrieving recent flights at an airport.

direction.description: FlightDirection specifies whether to retrieve departures, arrivals, or both.

limit.description: Maximum number of flights to return (1-100).

ListAirportFlightsResponse.description: ListAirportFlightsResponse contains recent flights at an airport.

totalAvailable.description: Total number of flights available from the provider.

updatedAt.description: Last update time as Unix epoch milliseconds.. Warning: Values > 2^53 may lose precision in JavaScript

ListAviationNewsRequest.description: ListAviationNewsRequest specifies filters for aviation news retrieval.

items.description: Entities to filter by (airline names, airport codes, route strings).

maxItems.description: Maximum number of news items to return (1-50).

windowHours.description: Time window in hours to look back (1-168).

ListAviationNewsResponse.description: ListAviationNewsResponse contains filtered aviation news items.

updatedAt.description: Last update time as Unix epoch milliseconds.. Warning: Values > 2^53 may lose precision in JavaScript

PaginationResponse.description: PaginationResponse contains pagination metadata returned alongside list results.

nextCursor.description: Cursor for fetching the next page. Empty string indicates no more pages.

totalCount.description: Total count of items matching the query, if known. Zero if the total is unknown.

PositionSample.description: PositionSample represents a single aircraft position observation.

observedAt.description: Observation time as Unix epoch milliseconds.. Warning: Values > 2^53 may lose precision in JavaScript

onGround.description: Whether the aircraft is on the ground.

source.description: PositionSource identifies the provider of aircraft position data.

trackDeg.description: True track over ground in degrees (0 = North, clockwise).

verticalRate.description: Vertical rate in metres per second (positive = climbing).

PriceQuote.description: PriceQuote represents a single flight price offer from a provider.

cabin.description: CabinClass represents the travel class for a flight ticket.

checkoutRef.description: Reference used during the checkout process (for follow-up actions).

expiresAt.description: Time when this quote expires, as Unix epoch milliseconds.. Warning: Values > 2^53 may lose precision in JavaScript

isIndicative.description: Whether the price is indicative rather than bookable.

observedAt.description: Time when this quote was observed, as Unix epoch milliseconds.. Warning: Values > 2^53 may lose precision in JavaScript

SearchFlightPricesRequest.description: SearchFlightPricesRequest specifies parameters for a flight price search.

cabin.description: CabinClass represents the travel class for a flight ticket.

maxResults.description: Maximum number of quotes to return (1-50).

nonstopOnly.description: Whether to restrict to nonstop flights only.

isDemoMode.description: Whether results are from demo/simulated mode.

isIndicative.description: Whether returned prices are indicative (subject to change).

updatedAt.description: Last update time as Unix epoch milliseconds.. Warning: Values > 2^53 may lose precision in JavaScript

TrackAircraftRequest.description: TrackAircraftRequest specifies an aircraft to track.

updatedAt.description: Last update time as Unix epoch milliseconds.. Warning: Values > 2^53 may lose precision in JavaScript

ValidationError.description: ValidationError is returned when request validation fails. It contains a list of field violations describing what went wrong.

get.description: GetAirportOpsSummary returns operational health metrics for watched airports.
GetCarrierOps returns delay and cancellation metrics grouped by carrier.

parameters.description: IATA airport codes to aggregate carrier metrics from.
parameters.name: airports

parameters.description: Minimum number of flights required to include a carrier (default: 1).
parameters.name: min_flights

get.description: GetFlightStatus looks up the current status of a specific flight.

parameters.description: Optional origin airport IATA code to disambiguate.
parameters.name: origin

get.description: ListAirportDelays retrieves current airport delay alerts.
ListAirportFlights retrieves recent flights at a specific airport.

parameters.description: Maximum number of flights to return (1-100).
parameters.name: limit

get.description: ListAviationNews retrieves filtered aviation news articles.

parameters.description: Entities to filter by (airline names, airport codes, route strings).
parameters.name: entities

parameters.description: Time window in hours to look back (1-168).
parameters.name: window_hours

parameters.description: Maximum number of news items to return (1-50).
parameters.name: max_items

get.description: SearchFlightPrices searches for flight price offers on a route.

parameters.description: Whether to restrict to nonstop flights only.
parameters.name: nonstop_only

parameters.description: Maximum number of quotes to return (1-50).
parameters.name: max_results

get.description: TrackAircraft retrieves recent position data for an aircraft.
